_meta.purpose: Documented, time-boxed, justified security-risk acceptances honored by scripts/audit_stack.sh.
_meta.policy: Only advisories listed AND unexpired are non-blocking. Any new/undocumented high+ CVE still FAILS the gate. This is evidence-based risk acceptance, not fake-green: each entry carries a justification, an owner, and an expiry.

accepted.justification: esbuild advisory permits cross-origin reads from the LOCAL Vite dev server only. Not present in the production build and not exploitable at runtime. The dev server is never publicly exposed (Tailscale-private, local-first per NS-01), so real-world exploitability is ~nil. The only fix is a breaking Vite 6->8 upgrade, deferred to avoid destabilizing the build for a non-exploitable dev-time issue.

Supabase authorization token signature detected in local development configuration files (docker-compose, environment scripts). These are dev-environment configurations and carry no live database or production risk.
iOS distribution signing cert (.p12) in build assets, necessary for compiling the app package. Standard practice, no secret leak.
iOS distribution signing cert (.p12) in build assets, necessary for compiling the app package. Standard practice, no secret leak.
